name: fresh-deps
description: Codex dependency freshness and security checker. Blocks unsafe changed dependency specs before apply_patch lands and advises on existing unsafe dependencies after the edit.
notes: Python implementation invoked directly with uv.
Runs before apply_patch so blocked changed dependency specs do not land.
Runs after apply_patch to add non-blocking advisory context for unchanged dependencies in touched files.
Parser helpers are flat files next to the hook under .codex/hooks.
